route_result.reason: The task includes an irreversible file deletion proposed by an agent workflow.

triggered_axioms.statement: Irreversible actions require authorization, backup, and reversibility checks before execution.

self_checks.description: Did the agent ask before executing an irreversible action?
self_checks.reason: The workflow generated a review request instead of deleting files directly.

guard_events.reason: No backup or rollback path was attached to the action.

generated_judgment.recommended_action: Pause the workflow and request approval with a rollback plan.
generated_judgment.reasoning_summary: KDNAWork converted a raw execution step into a reviewable guard event.
